V-M-039.checks: Session hardening must preserve login, refresh, logout, role gates, and rollback while reducing fragile client-side token exposure.
V-M-039.commands: planned auth smoke: user/admin login, refresh, logout, 401 retry behavior

module-checks.check-1: User login, register, refresh, logout, and 401 retry paths are tested.
module-checks.check-2: Admin login, refresh, logout, and role-gate paths are tested.
module-checks.check-3: Browser storage behavior is explicitly verified before and after migration.
module-checks.check-4: Rollback path is documented before execution.

scenarios.scenario-1: User and admin sessions survive normal refresh behavior and fail safely after logout.
scenarios.scenario-2: Session migration breaks Telegram auth, admin role checks, refresh retry, or logout cleanup.
scenarios.scenario-3: Tokens remain exposed in browser storage after the hardening phase claims completion.
